resources.string: Helps Monica find password fields for better autofill.
Could not create QR code for this value.
The linked note is unavailable. You can relink or remove this reference.
Monica secure keyboard follows the main app lock state.
Verify with biometrics or your master password to continue filling.
Could not open the unlock screen.
Pick a database, then tap an item to fill the current field.
Authenticator view is reserved here. I can wire the real TOTP list in next.
Document view is reserved here. I can wire the real document picker in next.
Saved TOTP codes will appear here after unlock.
Saved bank cards and documents will appear here after unlock.
Open Autofill to show accounts that match the current app.
Try another keyword such as app name, username, or website.
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock Monica
No biometric enrolled. Please set up fingerprint or face in system settings
Biometrics worked. Unlock with your master password once, then try again.
This device only supports weaker biometrics. Still enable fingerprint unlock?
Monica will create a secure password for you
Open a folder card above to browse.
Are you sure you want to logout?
Unable to queue the second copy step. Please copy manually.
Unable to decrypt password. Please view details and copy manually.
Account is empty. Please copy from details manually.
Require biometric or password verification before accessing autofill
Automatically stack or expand based on card type
After archiving, this item will move to Archived. You can restore it later.
Merge duplicate entries from different sources in \'All\' view
Experimental: treat account as its own login ID and autofill it directly
Prefer notes, then website, app, title
Strict: only identical websites stack. Relaxed: stack when the primary domain matches.
No key yet. Tap “Generate” to create one.
Supported by every SSH client. 2048 bits minimum; 3072+ recommended.
Modern, compact, faster and safer than RSA. Requires a recent SSH client.
Enter a URL, plain text, or any QR code payload
This content will be saved and rendered as a QR code.
This content cannot be rendered as the selected code type.
Not a valid Wi-Fi QR code
Added to system Wi-Fi suggestions. Tap \"Join\" on the system prompt.
Password copied. Open the network in Wi-Fi settings and paste.
Wi-Fi settings opened. Add the network manually.
Cannot open Wi-Fi settings on this device.
Enterprise Wi-Fi cannot be encoded as a QR code.
Generate a password or choose one from your common account templates.
Create a password template in Common Account Info first.
Analyze stored passwords to generate a similar and easy-to-remember password
Base32-encoded secret key, usually shown below QR code
Paste an otpauth://, otpauth-migration://, or motp:// link

1. Open site 2FA
2. Choose authenticator app
3. Copy key or scan QR
4. Paste above
Counter increases by 1 after each use
Standard time-based codes, refreshes every 30 seconds
Counter-based codes, generates new code each time
Click the + button in the bottom right to add your first bank card
This payment method will be moved to trash.
This billing address will be moved to trash.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Show or hide this tab in the bottom bar
Long press and drag to reorder tabs. Settings always stays at the end.
Choose which tabs appear and reorder them
Hide navigation when only one tab remains
With one tab, hide bottom nav and use the top-right Settings menu.
Swipe up on the nav bar to reveal quick actions
Click the + button in the bottom right to add your first document
All document information and photos are encrypted and stored locally on your device
Click the + button in the bottom right to add an authenticator
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Scanning QR codes requires camera access. Please grant camera permission to continue.
Camera permission is required to take photos
CSV file is not encrypted, please keep the exported file safe
Exports everything, including passwords, notes, and images. Works on Windows and Android.
Export passwords and authenticators in KeePass-compatible format for KeePass, KeePassXC, etc.
Export selected local Steam authenticators as plain maFile files for migration to other clients.
No local Steam authenticator accounts can be exported
Select at least one Steam account
You are exporting %1$d Steam authenticator account(s). Plain maFile contains secrets that can migrate the authenticator and approve confirmations. Keep the exported file private.
Confirm your identity to export plain Steam maFile data.
This password will encrypt the KDBX file. You\'ll need it when importing.
Enter the password to decrypt this KDBX file
Importing may overwrite data. Back up your current vault first.
Supports CSV files exported by the app and Alipay transaction details
Imported data will be added to existing data, current data will not be deleted
Monica is free and open source. No required fees, no locked core features.
🙏 If you find this app helpful
Feel free to support the author\'s continued development through the following ways:
Your support is my motivation to keep developing!
Thank you for using Monica Password Manager!
Hope it brings security and convenience to your digital life.
Storage permission is required to save images
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"?
Master password must be at least 3 characters long
Master password must be at least 3 characters long
Master password must be at least 3 characters long
Manage fingerprint unlock, auto lock, security questions, and master password reset.
Force backgrounds and surface containers to use absolute black in dark mode.
Pure black only takes effect while the app is in dark mode.
Choose the app appearance mode and decide whether dark surfaces should switch to OLED pure black.
Please enter your current password and set a new master password (at least 3 characters)
Please set your new master password (at least 3 characters)
Enter new master password (at least 3 characters)
Your master password has been successfully changed. Please remember your new password.
Password must be at least 3 characters
This permanently deletes saved passwords and resets Monica. This can\'t be undone.
Are you sure you want to reset all data?
All data has been reset. You can now set up a new master password.
Set recovery questions in case you forget your password.
Choose two different questions for recovery
Please select the first security question
Please select the second security question
Please enter two different custom questions
Please enter the first custom question
Please enter the second custom question
Please provide an answer to the first question
Please provide an answer to the second question
Please answer your security questions to reset your password
Too many incorrect attempts. Please contact support or use the complete reset option.
Please enter your master password to continue
Are you sure you want to delete %d selected notes?
This will move the selected items to the recycle bin. You can restore them later.
Remove the Steam Guard authenticator for \"%1$s\"? This removes it from Steam and deletes the local token. Steam may apply account or trade restrictions after removal.
If this authenticator has already been moved back to the official Steam app or another client, choose local delete. It only removes the local Monica copy and does not change your Steam account.
Verify your identity to remove the Steam authenticator for \"%1$s\".
Verify your identity to delete the local Monica Steam authenticator record for \"%1$s\".
Failed to remove Steam authenticator. %1$d attempt(s) remaining.
This Steam account has no login session. Sign in again before removing the authenticator.
This Steam account has no revocation code and cannot remove the authenticator automatically.
Add a local Steam account to view codes and confirmations.
Choose an action for %1$d selected confirmation(s).
Missing SteamID. This authenticator can only show codes.
Confirmations unavailable: this authenticator has no identity_secret. Import a complete maFile if you want Monica to approve trades.
Confirmations unavailable: missing Steam login session. Rebind this account from the detail page, then try again.
Missing SteamID. Login approval is unavailable for this code-only authenticator.
Login approval unavailable: missing shared_secret. Import a complete Steam authenticator or re-add this account.
Login approval unavailable: missing Steam login session. Rebind this account from the detail page, then scan again.
Could not remove the authorized device
Could not remove the authorized device (Steam EResult: %1$d)
A valid Steam web session is required to remove authorized devices. Re-import or sign in to this account.
Removing only this device requires the Steam login account name and password. Monica will generate the Steam Guard code automatically.
Monica will use the login saved on the detail page for automatic verification.
This follows Steam’s official flow and signs this account out on every device, including Monica’s current session. You will need to re-import or sign in to Steam again.
All Steam authorized devices were removed. Re-import or sign in to this account to restore session features.
Enter a remark, account and shared secret. Monica will only import the Steam Guard code token; confirmations, QR approval and authorized devices stay disabled.
Some maFiles only contain the authenticator secret. If import reports a missing SteamID, enter SteamID64 or the 32-bit Account ID below. You can also use Steam login to add the account directly.
You can continue without SteamID, but this account will only show Steam Guard codes. Confirmations, login approval, authorized devices, and remote removal stay disabled.
Optional. Account ID is converted to SteamID64 automatically.
This maFile is missing SteamID. Enter SteamID64 or Account ID, then import again.
Enter a valid SteamID64 or 32-bit Account ID.
Cannot load Steam accounts from MDBX
Moves or copies the complete maFile, including login session data, so confirmations and login approvals keep working after transfer.
No other Steam database is available.
This maFile has no SteamID, so only the code is available. Log in to Steam to complete SteamID and session. This does not transfer or rebind the authenticator.
This maFile has no SteamID and no confirmation secret, so only the code is available. Log in to complete SteamID and session; confirmations will still stay unavailable.
Use the Steam account that belongs to this authenticator. Monica will update this record instead of adding a new one.
SteamID completed. Supported Steam features are now unlocked.
SteamID completed. This authenticator still only supports codes because it has no confirmation secret.
This Steam account already exists in Monica.
This Steam authenticator is no longer available.
Log in to the Steam account that belongs to this authenticator. Monica will refresh SteamID, device and session information without replacing the token.
Steam account rebound. The authenticator token was not replaced.
Scan this QR code with the Steam mobile app or another Steam authenticator to approve Monica login.
Enter a Steam Guard code, or approve this login in the Steam mobile app.
Steam login approval timed out. Try again after approving faster.
Steam sent an activation code by email. Enter it to finish binding Steam Guard.
Steam sent an SMS activation code. Enter it to finish binding Steam Guard.
View and manage passwords from multiple sources
Manage sync with Bitwarden and other services
Create a passkey in an app or website, and it will show up here.
This device can\'t create passkeys, but you can still view synced ones.
Create passkeys from supported apps or websites by choosing \"Use passkey\".
Passkey creation needs Android 14+. Current: %1$s. Synced passkeys are still viewable.
More secure than passwords - resistant to phishing
Easy to use - just use your fingerprint or face
Create a passkey for %1$s to sign in without a password
Use your passkey to sign in to %1$s
This system cannot handle this passkey QR code.
Create passkeys on websites and apps to see them here
Delete the passkey for %1$s (%2$s)? You won\'t be able to sign in with it.
Category is inherited from the bound password.
No categories yet. You can create one in folder management.
Stored as Monica-only KeePass passkey data. Syncs with Monica/KeePass, not Bitwarden.
This legacy passkey cannot be migrated to Bitwarden.
This passkey cannot be moved to Bitwarden.
Bitwarden action failed, item was not moved.
%1$d passkeys cannot be migrated to Bitwarden.
Target KeePass database already contains this passkey.
%1$d passkeys already exist in the target KeePass database.
Passkeys are unique credentials. Copy uses safe move behavior.
KeePass source items can only be copied to other databases.
Stored locally on this device. Keeps the 10 most recent passwords.
Temporarily unavailable. Unlock again or update the password to refresh this history entry.
Stored locally in encrypted form. Only snapshots that differ from the previous one are kept.
Raw payload hidden (%1$d chars). Tap eye icon to view.
No snapshots yet. Run Bitwarden sync to save the next changed raw snapshot.
Tap to preview this snapshot as Monica fields.
Unlock this Bitwarden vault to parse the snapshot into Monica fields.
This snapshot was saved, but its payload can no longer be parsed into a Monica preview.
This snapshot is not a Bitwarden login cipher Monica can preview yet. Cipher type: %1$d.
This is the data Monica is currently showing for this Bitwarden-linked entry.
Current Monica data is temporarily unavailable.
Delete this local history password record? This cannot be undone.
Clear all local history passwords for this account? This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this card?
This only deletes the current copy. The other %1$d copies in other targets will be kept.
Images are inserted into note content.
An unsaved new note draft was found. Restore the last edited content?
Bitwarden storage: inline image is disabled for compatibility.
Bitwarden notes currently do not allow inline images.
%1$d selected notes include images. Images stay local and won\'t sync to Bitwarden. Continue?
Tap the + button to create your first secure note
Are you sure you want to delete "%s"? This action cannot be undone.
The note you\'re looking for may have been deleted or moved.
Set security questions for password recovery
Includes bundled Stratum Auth icons (v1.4.0, GPL-3.0). Brands and logos belong to their owners.
Compare this version with the latest GitHub Release
A newer Monica for Android release is available.
The installed version is already the latest release.
Allow Monica to install unknown apps, then try again.
Could not open the system installer.
Monica will re-encrypt everything. Remember the new password or you may lose access.
Choose a memorable master password. Letters, numbers, symbols, and Chinese are all supported now.
Supports letters, numbers, symbols, and Chinese
Password must be at least 3 characters
Master password changed. Sign in again with the new one.
New password must be at least 3 characters
New password cannot be the same as current password
Set recovery questions in case you forget your password.
Recovery questions are set. You can use them if you forget your password.
Please select the first security question
Please select the second security question
Please select the third security question
Please provide an answer to the first question
Please provide an answer to the second question
Please provide an answer to the third question
What is your mother\'s maiden name?
What was the name of your first pet?
What city were you born in?
What was the name of your elementary school?
What is the name of your best friend from childhood?
Enjoying Monica? Your support helps keep it improving.
Thank you for using Monica Password Manager. Your support means a lot!
Use system default color scheme instead of extracting colors from wallpaper
Disable shared element animations to fix lag on some devices (HyperOS 2/Android 15)
Select a color scheme for the app
Customize three seed colors for the app theme
Material 3 colors are generated from your chosen seeds.
Display a single 30s progress bar at the top for all standard TOTP entries
Enable smooth animation for seamless progress display without stuttering
Monica Database eXtended: the official local-first encrypted database format with compatible access to older test vaults
Store a new MDBX vault in private app storage on this device.
Choose an existing .mdbx file and copy it into private app storage.
Create a new MDBX vault file on a WebDAV server.
Browse and connect to an existing .mdbx file on a WebDAV server.
Maximum security for highly sensitive data. Higher memory usage and slower unlock.
Balanced security and performance. Suitable for most use cases.
Fast and lightweight. Suitable for low-risk environments.
Create your first MDBX vault on WebDAV
Local-first encrypted password database using Git-style commit DAG for incremental sync. Sync performance on cloud storage (WebDAV / OneDrive) is significantly better than KDBX.
Project-centric organization · Tiga 3-tier security · Native attachments · Field-level AEAD encryption · Append-friendly writes · KB-level deltas
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"?\n\nThis will only remove the local reference. The file on WebDAV will not be deleted.
Field-level custom merge is not enabled yet. Choose one side now, or keep this conflict unresolved until the merge editor is available.
Hide the floating action button when scrolling down
Experimental: use in-memory mutation + async persist for KeePass operations (off by default)
Show sync state above the bottom area on Bitwarden pages
Vibrate when countdown is about to end
Display website icons for password, authenticator, and passkey cards
Software is completely free, thank you for your support
Export all data to CSV file
WebDAV fields filled from selected password
Are you sure you want to delete backup:\n%s?
Password must be at least 8 characters
Decryption failed: Wrong password or corrupted file
Backup on first daily launch or every 12 hours
Network unreachable, please check network connection
Connection timeout, please check server address and network connection
Authentication failed, please check username and password
Server path not found, please check server address
Server is rate-limiting requests. Please retry after %1$d seconds.
Server is rate-limiting backup requests. Try again later.
Authentication failed. Please verify your username and password.
Server does not accept this WebDAV operation. Check server path.
Cannot reach the server. Check the address and network connection.
Server returned an unexpected response format.
Clear all local data before restoring from backup
Are you sure you want to delete %d passwords?
Are you sure you want to delete %d TOTP items?
This authenticator is linked to a password. Deleting it will also remove the authenticator key from that password.
These authenticators are linked to passwords. Deleting them will also remove authenticator keys from those passwords.
Are you sure you want to delete %d documents?
Are you sure you want to delete %d bank cards?
Please wait while selected items are being deleted.
Shows batch delete progress across databases
Set stack mode for selected passwords?
Apply one of the following modes to %1$d selected passwords.
Group selected passwords into one custom stack. Manual stack has higher priority than auto stack.
Cancel custom stack mode and return to automatic stacking behavior.
Selected passwords will never be stacked and will always stay as independent cards.
Switched %1$d passwords back to auto stack
Added entire group of %d passwords to favorites
Removed entire group of %d passwords from favorites
Please enter your master password to confirm
Auto-fill passwords for apps and websites
Sign in to apps and websites without passwords
Create and manage passkeys for apps and websites.
Passkey Provider requires Android 14 or later. Your device is running Android %1$s.
Enable Monica as a Passkey provider in system settings
Sign in with fingerprint or face recognition
Sync passkeys across devices with WebDAV backup
Works only on the right website
Monica can create passkeys on Android 14+. Synced passkeys can still be viewed here.
Observe and log suspicious passkey requests without blocking sign-ins.
Block requests that clearly conflict with relying-party origin rules.
Strict mode can block buggy apps. Leave it off unless you\'re debugging.
On Xiaomi HyperOS, skip passkey biometric prompts and use master-password fallback when needed.
Automatically fill passwords and forms in apps and websites
This is not an autofill field
After marking, Monica will stop showing autofill here.
After marking, Monica will stop showing autofill for %1$s here.
Delete all passwords, authenticators, bank cards and documents
This permanently deletes passwords, authenticators, cards, and documents.\n\nExport a backup first.
Check password security, breaches and 2FA status
Analysis may take a few minutes
Enable to analyze automatically; disable for manual analyze only.
Show password strength, passkey availability and 2FA status on password details.
Great! No accounts are waiting for passkey setup
Powered by Have I Been Pwned
No category available for this type
No entries yet. Tap + to add one
Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
No assets yet. Tap + to add one
Are you sure you want to delete this asset? All associated ledger entries will also be affected.
Biometric authentication failed. Please try again.
Use the generator to create secure passwords
Select a password to view details
Select an authenticator to view details
Select a document to view details
Select a bank card to view details
Select Monica as autofill service in system settings
Manage passkeys, passwords and data services
Enable third-party fill service support in Chrome
Allow manual selection of password to fill
Skip browser fields that disable autofill
Show 2FA code in notification when autofilling
Automatically copy 2FA code to clipboard when autofilling
Automatically prompt to save passwords when filling forms
Automatically update password when duplicate username detected
Display notification after password is saved successfully
Automatically generate password title from app name or domain
Automatically record app package name to password entry
Automatically record website domain to password entry
Prevent specific apps from using autofill
%1$d targets will no longer show save prompts.
Monica won\'t show save prompts for these apps or sites. Remove one to allow prompts again.
No apps or websites have been blocked from save prompts yet.
Apps in blacklist will not be able to use autofill
Autofill works on Android 8+. Once enabled, Monica can fill saved logins in apps and websites.
Monica is set as default autofill service
Please enable Monica in system settings
Please enable Monica as autofill service in system settings
Match base domain and all subdomains (Recommended)
Match only specified domain and subdomains
Match if URL starts with specified string
Use regular expression for advanced matching
Log viewing and developer debugging tools
Skip password verification on app startup (for development testing only)
On HyperOS devices, skip passkey biometric verification and fall back to master password. Keep this off unless biometric prompts fail on that device.
Use Monica Pass as launcher name
On: Monica Pass. Off: Monica. This only changes the main launcher entry name.
Record redacted sync snapshots (lengths and counters only, no plaintext)
Save redacted sync/upload payload previews for debugging. Long data is trimmed.
No external folder selected. Logs stay in app private storage.
Folder saved, but persistent permission grant failed. Re-select if write fails.
Stop mirroring logs to external storage and keep internal logs only
⚠️ Developer functions are for testing only, do not enable in production environment
No logs\n\nTip: Make sure the app has run some operations
Load failed: %s\n\nDebug permissions may be required to read logs
Password is too short, at least 6 characters recommended
Recommend using 12 or more characters for better security
⚠️ This is a common password, easy to crack!
Password is too predictable, recommend increasing randomness
Saved from password generator history\nGenerated at: %s
Custom word to include in phrase
Separate words with spaces or commas. Generated phrase will mix these words in.
Passwords generated and used through autofill will appear here
No symbols available after filters. Add allowed symbols or disable exclusion options.
Tap symbols to exclude. This is faster when only a few symbols are not allowed.
Choose which types of passwords to display in history
View and manage permissions used by Monica
Used for: QR code scanning for TOTP authenticator
Used for: Saving exported data and images
Used for: WebDAV backup and sync
Used for: Haptic feedback for authenticator
Used for: Auto-filling passwords in apps and browsers
Used for: Manual fill from the quick settings tile and picker
Used for: Displaying TOTP codes in notification bar
To revoke this permission, go to Settings > Apps > Monica > Permissions
Tap to open system settings and grant this permission

Tap a permission to manage it.

Required: core
Recommended: useful
Optional: extras
See Monica\'s permissions and status. Tap one to manage it in system settings.
Choose which types of data to include in your backup
Include recycle bin, password generator history, and operation history
Back up all local KeePass databases. Restores into internal storage.
Include KeePass WebDAV sync settings for easy setup on new devices.
Back up WebDAV, auto backup, autofill blocks, account info, page tweaks, and Bitwarden vaults.
Please select at least one content type
Automatically clear copied usernames and passwords from the clipboard.
When countdown is within 5 seconds, copy the next verification code
Upgrade to Monica Plus to unlock more cloud sync features
Manage local/KeePass folders and Bitwarden sync
Ignore folder rules and sync everything to Bitwarden
Creating folders is not supported yet
Enter password and/or select key file to verify and update saved credentials.
Create a new database or open an existing one
Stored securely in Monica app data
Secure, encrypted, only accessible by Monica
Choose your own location, accessible by other apps
Mounted working copies from WebDAV or other cloud providers
Add an existing .kdbx file from external storage
Attach an existing .kdbx file from your WebDAV server as a working copy
Attach an existing .kdbx file from your OneDrive as a working copy
This will remove the database record. The file will also be deleted from internal storage.
This will remove the database reference. The original file will not be deleted.
Remove this remote database and local copy. The cloud file stays untouched.
Enter the password to unlock this KeePass database
“%1$s” isn\'t ready: %2$s.\n\nRefresh or sync this KeePass database, then try again.
If you find Monica useful, please consider supporting the development:
求各位股东入资，月收益10块，买不起token了，要饿死了😭😭😭😭
感谢您的支持！Plus功能已激活
付款后输入激活码，系统将连接云端进行校验并绑定当前设备。
求各位股东入资，月收益10块，买不起token了，要饿死了😭😭😭😭
Are you sure you want to delete this password? This action cannot be undone.
Set default values to quickly fill when adding new entries
Auto-fill default info when adding new entry
Manage reusable templates for email, account, phone, and password.
Save a default billing address for payments and card forms.
Could not get an address from the current location
Location permission is required to fill the address automatically
Create your first common account template from the button below.
Are you sure you want to delete this template?
Create reusable items for quick copy and fill.
Create a name template first, or save one from your existing cards and documents.
Quick add is not available for this page
Sync linked categories to Bitwarden cloud
Are you sure you want to delete folder \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
Sync linked categories to Bitwarden cloud
Choose a database or parent folder.
Move this folder to the Monica root level.
Are you sure you want to delete folder \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
When editing, multi-select only adds targets. Existing targets stay kept.
Save now and fill next time
Select a password to copy to clipboard
No suggested items in this context
You can select one from all passwords
Try adjusting search\nor add a new password in the main app
Try adjusting your search or add new payment info
This page is currently recognized as %1$s, so %2$s cannot be filled directly here. Copy the needed field instead.
Please sign in and connect Bitwarden in Settings before creating or managing Send items.
Please unlock your vault in Bitwarden settings to use Send.
Tap Add to create your first text Send with expiry, limits, or a password.
Try another keyword or clear search to see all results.
Delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Sends are encrypted with Bitwarden. Links can expire, have limits, or require passwords.
File Sends require Bitwarden Premium on official Bitwarden servers. Self-hosted Bitwarden vaults can use File Sends.
Unlock a Bitwarden account before creating Send.
Recipients will not see sender email
Hide plaintext after first view (Bitwarden standard)
Deleted items will be moved to recycle bin first
This Bitwarden password can\'t be read right now. Leave it blank to keep it.
Password is temporarily unreadable on this device. Unlock again or resync Bitwarden.
This password is temporarily unreadable and cannot be copied.
This password is temporarily unreadable on this device. Please unlock again and try later.
This password is currently unavailable for copy. Please unlock again first.
This entry belongs to multiple vaults. Fix ownership before editing.
Storage ownership conflicts across Monica, KeePass, or Bitwarden. Repair before editing.
This entry has conflicting ownership and its password cannot be copied safely.
Please login and unlock Bitwarden first
Verify with your master password or biometrics to re-unlock the current database.
Sync complete: %1$d changes applied, %2$d passwords available offline.
Shows Bitwarden sync summaries and warning counts
This removes the local Bitwarden cache for this vault. You can sync again later.
Pending: %1$d ops, %2$d password edits, %3$d item edits, %4$d conflicts. Clear synced cache?
Synced cache cleared (%1$d items). Protected cipher count: %2$d
Your operation history will appear here
Shows batch copy and move progress across databases
Snapshot restored: %1$d passwords and %2$d items deleted; %3$d passwords and %4$d items restored
Snapshot restored (legacy mode): deleted %1$d passwords, %2$d secure items
Save old data as new entry
Permanently delete %1$d items in recycle bin? This cannot be undone.
Permanently delete %1$d selected items? This cannot be undone.
Will be permanently deleted in %1$d days
Permanently delete \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
Enable recycle bin to temporarily keep deleted items here
Deleted passwords, authenticators, and more will appear here
If an app is not listed, you can enter app info manually
Required, used as unique app identifier
• Check the app store page\n• Use a package-name viewer\n• Check system App settings
Delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
When enabled, content is hidden by default
File does not exist or is empty
Lower quality reduces storage and backup size. The imported image will be saved after compression.
Cannot open camera, switching to gallery
Choose which item types to sync to this folder
Choose a target and create folder in one step
Tap to choose Monica, KeePass, or Bitwarden targets
Bitwarden folders are flat. New folders are created at root level.
Align the QR code with the scanning frame
Invalid QR code. Please scan a valid authenticator QR code.
PhoneFactor QR code is not supported yet.
Imported %1$d authenticators, skipped %2$d duplicates, failed %3$d items.
This migration QR contains %1$d authenticators. Filled the first one only.
Enter a key to auto-create an authenticator
Associate this app with all passwords that share the same website
Associate this app with all passwords that share the same title
Connect to Bitwarden and sync passwords, cards, and other data
Sync data with KeePass (.kdbx) through WebDAV
Scan Monica, KeePass, and Bitwarden data with rule-based duplicate governance
Review exact duplicates, cross-source mirrors, and type-level conflicts in one place
Review duplicates, lock a strategy, then clean up with less noise.
Set the primary database first, then narrow the review scope and issue focus.
Use this layer to jump straight into one conflict shape when the list gets dense.
%1$d clusters are waiting for review in the current view
Choose your trusted database. Monica will prefer keeping it when resolving duplicates.
Keep the page compact by putting the primary database, scope, and issue type in one control card.
Limit the source range you are reviewing right now.
Focus on a single duplicate type here when needed.
If this source has multiple databases, choose which one should be kept first.
If this source has multiple databases, narrow the current review to one of them.
The current selection does not share a safe batch action yet.
This scope currently looks clean, or the remaining items were intentionally ignored.
Keep %1$s and archive other password copies
Keep 1 %1$s record and archive the rest
Keep 1 Monica item and trash the rest
Same source, same account, same password. Suitable for cleanup inside %1$s.
The same account appears across %1$s. Prefer governance instead of direct deletion.
Exact password duplicates were found in the same source. Keep 1 %1$s record and archive the rest.
This account appears in multiple databases. Keep %1$s and archive the other copies.
No %1$s record found. Keep %2$s and archive the other copies.
Authenticator secrets or issuer/account pairs overlap across %1$s.
The same card fingerprint appears across %1$s.
The same document number appears across %1$s.
Multiple passkeys are bound to the same site account in %1$s. Review before deleting anything.
Customize which field cards are shown
Disabled fields are hidden when adding or editing.\n\nFields with existing data still appear.
Contact details such as email and phone
Auto-added when creating passwords, cannot be deleted
Preset fields appear when adding passwords. They\'re locked to avoid accidental deletion.
Tap Add above to create commonly used field templates
Delete preset field \"%1$s\"?\n\nThis will not delete existing data in added passwords.
Hidden by default; marked as sensitive when copied
Must be filled when adding passwords
Shown when the input is empty
Restore a full ZIP backup including all data
KeePass 1.x .kdb isn\'t supported. Convert it to .kdbx first.
Open this file in KeePassDX or KeePassXC and save it as .kdbx, then import again.
Check the password and key file. Make sure the key format matches its source.
Re-select the database or key file and grant read permission again.
KDF memory is too high for this device. Lower Argon2 memory/parallelism and retry.
Unsupported format/cipher, or the file is damaged. Check it in KeePassDX/KeePassXC.
I/O failed while reading the file. Check file integrity and storage availability, then retry.
Import CSV exported from Monica / KeePass / Bitwarden / Proton Pass / Password Keyboard
Import JSON backup from Aegis Authenticator
Paste your device ID and SteamGuard JSON for coexist import.
Sign in with your Steam account, then complete verification code when prompted.
Verification required, please enter the code.
Paste full JSON containing shared_secret and serial_number
Leave empty to use account_name from JSON
Steam login fields filled from selected password
Import CSV exported by Proton Pass
Import CSV exported by Google Chrome
Import CSV exported by Password Keyboard app
CSV tags can become custom fields or be skipped. Authenticator tags import when supported.
This Aegis backup is encrypted. Enter password to decrypt.
%1$d large images can be optimized (%2$d optimized)
All images are optimized, no compression needed
Compress %1$d large images to shrink the backup?\n\nQuality may drop slightly.

Restore this backup?

%1$s

All backup data will be imported into this app.
Deduplicate only against Monica local data
Off: keep old behavior (global dedup across all data). On: only dedup with local entries.
May treat KeePass / Bitwarden items as duplicates.
Default: only deduplicate against Monica local data.
KeePass / Bitwarden data will not be changed.
This backup includes %1$d Monica setting(s). Restore them too?
Settings from “%1$s” were restored. Restart Monica to apply them everywhere.
After countdown ends, tap Confirm and relaunch Monica.
This backup file is encrypted. Enter password to decrypt:
KeePassDX-like behavior: use conditional write when possible, otherwise best-effort save.
Require server-side conflict metadata; safer but may block writes on some WebDAV servers.
Strict mode: blocks writes if ETag is missing or the remote file changed.
Auto mode: use If-Match with ETag, otherwise save best-effort.
Create an empty KeePass database on your WebDAV server.
A database with the same name already exists
Select a remote .kdbx file below to attach for direct read/write.
Force-push local data to WebDAV? Remote-only changes will be lost.
This remote database is not attached yet
Sign in, browse folders, pick a .kdbx, or create one here.
Sign in, browse folders, pick a .kdbx, or create one here.
Sign in with your Microsoft account to browse OneDrive.
No foreground activity available for OneDrive sign-in
No folders or .kdbx databases found in this OneDrive directory
Create a new folder in the current OneDrive directory.
Back up Monica data to a OneDrive folder and restore from backup files there.
No folders found in this OneDrive directory
Use Current Folder as Backup Directory
Connect OneDrive and choose a backup directory first
Use the same encrypted ZIP format as WebDAV backup.
Attach an existing .kdbx file from your Google Drive as a working copy
Sign in, browse folders, pick a .kdbx, or create one here.
Sign in with your Google account to browse Google Drive.
No foreground activity available for Google Drive sign-in
Failed to load Google Drive files
No folders or .kdbx databases found in this Google Drive directory
Create a new folder in the current Google Drive directory.
No folders or .kdbx databases found in this directory
Create a new folder in the current WebDAV directory.
KeePass WebDAV has been removed. Please use local KeePass database management.
Wrong password, failed to decrypt database
Open autofill UI with mock data for debugging UI and logic
Add an extra layer of security
Unlock exclusive theme palettes such as Monet.
Pin TOTP codes in the notification shade for quick access.
Vibrate before a code refreshes so you do not miss the input window.
If less than 5 seconds remain, copy will automatically grab the next TOTP code.
Connect Bitwarden to sync passwords, cards, and other data across devices.
Customize page layout and display behavior
Customize top quick filters in the password list
Customize how the main add button behaves on the password page
Choose whether Add opens the editor or expands into more actions.
Direct mode opens Add Password immediately. Expand mode shows a configurable action menu.
Tap the add button to open Add Password directly.
Tap the add button to expand a multi-action add menu.
Toggle actions and drag to reorder the expanded add menu. Add Password is always enabled.
You can hide this action or drag to reorder it.
Preview reflects currently enabled top modules and their order.
No top modules enabled. Turn on at least one item below.
Show cards, notes, 2FA, and passkeys here. Turn off for passwords only.
Choose content types and reorder the top filters. Passwords stay enabled.
Show chips for favorites, 2FA, notes, stacks, and other content types.
Toggle each quick filter item and drag to reorder.
Show folder chips under quick filters. Tap again to go up or clear.
Show folder cards above the password list.
Show a folder path banner above the password list. Works independently from quick folder cards.
System back goes to parent folder
In a subfolder, system Back goes to the parent folder first.
Show a shortcut for recent and frequent passwords above Add.
Redesign display and grouping for password cards
Customize authenticator card content and order
Configure icon visibility for Password, Authenticator and Passkey pages
Turn this off to hide all card icons. Keep it on to apply page-specific switches below.
Use the current Monica colorful icon as the launcher icon.
Switch back to the previous Monica classic launcher icon.
Configure icon visibility for each page independently.
Show site/app icons in password cards
Show site/app icons in authenticator cards
Show icons in passkey list cards
When no icon source matches, choose how cards should render the icon area.
The resolver checks from top to bottom and stops at the first matched source.
Priority: custom icon > uploaded icon > auto match > favicon > app icon > default
Priority: custom icon > uploaded icon > auto match > favicon > app icon > default
Priority: custom icon > uploaded icon > auto match > favicon > app icon > default
Priority: bound custom icon > uploaded icon > auto match > favicon > app icon > default
Icon assets from Stratum Auth app v1.4.0 (GPL-3.0).
Brand names and logos are trademarks of their respective owners.
Title is always displayed. You can customize and reorder up to 3 extra lines.
Only the first 3 selected fields are shown on cards.
Show the bound 2FA code and countdown on the card. This item stays fixed.
Hide other content when authenticator is shown
When 2FA is shown, hide other card fields and keep the card compact.
Title is always displayed. You can customize and reorder up to 2 extra lines.
Only the first 2 selected fields are shown on cards.
Show asterisks on authenticator cards until tapped.
Open passwords you use most without searching.
Autofill is now handled by a rebuilt Bitwarden-style engine. Legacy chain is frozen.
Turn Monica autofill on or off at app level.
Only allow high-confidence package/domain matches to reduce false fill.
Treat subdomains of the same site as related login targets.
Skip fields where apps/websites explicitly disable autofill.
Show autofill suggestions in the keyboard candidate bar. When off, only the traditional dropdown menu is used.
Offer to save new credentials after login/register.
Block autofill in sensitive apps (%1$d packages).
These fields were marked as not suitable for autofill. Remove an item to allow autofill again.
No fields have been marked yet.
Attached blocked autofill fields export file.
Set Monica as system autofill service
Open Android system settings and set Monica as your autofill provider.
Open Android settings for credential-provider privileges.
Legacy autofill and its old settings are frozen. New behavior is controlled only by this V2 page.
Set which storage source Monica shows by default when autofill list opens.
Limit default suggestions and list items to one KeePass database.
Limit default suggestions and list items to one Bitwarden vault.
Repaired %1$d legacy authenticators, queued %2$d for Bitwarden, skipped %3$d.
Repaired %1$d legacy authenticator records locally and skipped %2$d records.
No legacy Bitwarden authenticator issues were found to repair.
Failed to repair legacy Bitwarden authenticator data: %1$s
Re-run master password, autofill, appearance, bottom bar, and page habit settings
Continuous mode selects everything from the last item to the current one.
Run through the most common settings at once
Set master password, biometrics, and security questions
Choose a Monica that looks good to you
Connect existing password vault or backup
Decide how the password list is filtered and grouped
Decide what info the password card shows
Decide authenticator card info and progress display
Finally decide whether to enable more extensions
All set. You can change these later in Settings or reopen this from Extensions.
Monica has a lot of settings. Want a quick setup walkthrough?
We\'ll cover only the settings that matter most at first. You can skip or reopen this later.
Already set, can be used to unlock and protect data
Recommended to set a master password first
Enable to unlock faster with fingerprint or face
Already set, used to verify identity when you forget your master password
Easier to recover if you forget your master password
Show account, password, card, and 2FA suggestions in login forms.
Already enabled? Tap Next. You can tune autofill source and verification later.
Keeping at least one common entry will be more convenient
You can connect your data to Monica first
Already have a vault or backup? Connect or import it here.
Open Bitwarden sync settings. After connecting, you can sync your existing password vault.
Used for snapshot backup, backup Monica data to your WebDAV storage.
Open local KeePass settings page, connect local KDBX password vault.
Enter import page, manually import existing data from file.
Manage all items on password page
Hide other content when showing authenticator
Only the first 3 of selected fields will be shown on the card.
Authenticator card will display in real-time based on these field and progress settings.
Plus features are now available, you can continue using after initialization.
Need Plus themes, sync, or extensions? Activate now, or just finish.
Free accounts can attach up to 10 files per password. Upgrade to Plus to remove this limit.
Bitwarden attachments require a Premium account.
File is too large for this KeePass database.
This file (%1$s) is larger than the recommended KeePass cap. It may exceed what your device can load. Continue anyway?
This file is %1$d MB, larger than the recommended %2$d MB cap. It may use significant storage. Continue anyway?

%1$d selected, %2$d have attachments.

Your Bitwarden account is free and cannot sync attachments:
• %2$d item(s) with attachments will be copied to Bitwarden (without attachments); the local entry and attachments will be kept.
• The remaining %3$d item(s) will be moved to Bitwarden normally.
Preview not available for this file type
Tap the open button to view with an external app
Add or import a Steam account before opening trade offers.
Sign in to Steam again to load trade offers.
Trade action submitted. Complete the mobile confirmation.
Verify identity before accepting this trade offer. Review every item from both sides before continuing.
Verify identity before declining this trade offer.
Verify identity before canceling this sent trade offer.
This account needs a valid Steam community session
Remove %1$s from the Steam Community Market?
Steam and game fees are calculated from the account wallet in real time.
Only new market confirmations created by this operation will be approved.
Listed %1$d item(s); mobile confirmation is pending
%1$d item(s) have no usable price. Choose another preset or enter a manual price.
One item from each selected stack will be listed
Preset values are buyer prices. Monica converts each one to the amount received after Steam and game fees.
The same amount received will be used for every selected item.
You are about to cancel %1$d Steam Market listing(s). Verify your identity to continue. This cannot be undone.
You are about to list %1$d item(s) using the reviewed received prices. Verify your identity to continue.
This overrides the batch pricing mode for this item only.
Enter a valid received price greater than zero.
No usable price. Tap to set one.
Set a Monica master password or enable enrolled biometrics before using this action.
Show the Steam mini profile background on token and account detail cards. Dynamic backgrounds play only while visible; cached media is limited to 64 MB.
Show one 30-second progress bar above Steam Guard codes.
Animate Steam Guard progress continuously without visible steps.
Steam server time is unavailable. Local credential checks are still current.
Add or import a Steam Guard account to run health checks.
Complete Steam sign-in to restore the account SteamID.
Re-import authenticator data to restore the device ID.
Restore a valid shared secret before using Steam Guard codes.
Import the identity secret to enable confirmations.
Store the recovery code in a protected backup.
Sign in to Steam again to refresh the session.
Enable automatic date and time in Android settings.
Connect to the internet and retry the server time check.
CN store metadata: %1$d/%2$d (%3$d%%). The estimate sums each game’s original CN store price; it is not an account sale value.
This game has no Steam achievements.
This profile or game has private statistics. Change Steam privacy settings and retry.
A valid Steam session is required. Sign in again and retry.
Steam is rate limiting requests. Wait and retry; cached data is kept.
Steam could not be reached. Cached data is kept for offline viewing.
Game library data is unavailable. Retry after checking the account session.
Add or import a Steam account before opening the game library.
Inventory sync failed; the previous inventory count is kept.
No games match this search or filter.
No regional prices are available for this game.
Steam store prices in each region’s local currency. Availability and checkout eligibility depend on the Steam account region.
Import and export Steam Guard accounts as a mafile ZIP. WebDAV stores only the same mafile ZIP format.
The backup password is independent from the Monica master password. Losing it makes the file unrecoverable.
Use at least 8 characters for the backup password.
The backup passwords do not match.
Verify the Monica master password before accessing mafile import, export, or WebDAV backup.
Only mafile ZIP files in steam/mafiles are used.
Download and import %1$s into the local Steam account store.
Local ZIP import/export and mafile-only WebDAV backup
Create, open, and manage local or WebDAV MDBX databases
Keep existing accounts when Steam IDs conflict
Replace existing accounts with backup data
Separate tags with commas or new lines.
Each tag can use at most %1$d characters.
Show this account before other accounts in the code list.
A privacy-safe shortcut that opens Steam Guard without showing account data or codes.
Choose where to place the Monica Steam widget.
This launcher does not support pinning widgets. Add Monica Steam from the system widget picker.
Open Steam Guard from Quick Settings. The tile never displays codes or account details.
Monica Steam was added to Quick Settings.
The Quick Settings tile was not added.
Open the Quick Settings editor to add the Monica Steam tile.
View pending gifts and accept or decline them on Steam\'s official page.
Steam may ask this account to sign in again before showing its gifts.
Select an account to open its gift inbox.
Gift acceptance and rejection are handled only by Steam\'s official website.
Review the recipient, item, amount and action before continuing. Approval or rejection requires identity verification.
Verify identity before approving %1$d confirmation(s). %2$d are marked high risk. Review the item, account and amount before continuing.
Verify identity before rejecting %1$d confirmation(s). %2$d are marked high risk.
Set a Monica master password or enable enrolled biometrics before approving or rejecting confirmations.
Reference market value only. It is not an account sale price or cash-out amount.
Refresh to estimate market value for loaded marketable items.
No usable market prices were returned.
%1$d listings have invalid or incomplete prices.
Run private, battery-friendly checks while the device is awake.
Notify when Steam reports confirmation activity that needs review.
Refresh expiring local sessions and report sessions that need attention.
Notify when the total authorized-device baseline changes.
Remind when saved library price data is older than 24 hours.
Manage the Monica Steam private alert channel in Android.
Private status reminders for Monica Steam.
Open Monica Steam to review account, confirmation, device, or cached price status.
Open Monica Steam to review status.
Drag to arrange Tokens, Game Library, Store, and Settings.
Long press the handle, then drag an item to change the Dock order.
Adjust the size of Monica Steam without changing Android system display settings. System font scaling remains active.
Open the game page to add this item to Steam manually.
Add games from their store pages and they will appear here.
Games saved to your Steam account will appear here after syncing.
Not sold in the current account region
This game cannot be purchased in the current account region. Regional prices and the official Steam page remain available.
View regional original prices and CNY conversions
Add a Steam account from the Steam Guard page before switching accounts.
This account has no reusable Steam login session. The official page may ask you to sign in.
Checkout and payment are handled only by Steam’s official website.
Save recent crashes and Steam diagnostics with credentials and Steam IDs redacted.
Shows one selected account’s avatar, playtime, inventory count and estimated value.
Shows the selected account’s most recently played games and current game.
Choose an account, then show avatar, playtime, inventory and value on the home screen.
Choose an account, then show the current game first and recent games below.
Add a Steam account before placing a widget.
Open Monica Steam to sync this account.
No recent games in the cached library.
Notifications, gifts, invitations, and account events for the selected account.
Showing the last successful sync while Steam is unavailable.
Steam notifications could not be loaded.
Sign in to this Steam account again to load notifications.
Open the signed-in Steam gift page
Steam reports a pending gift that needs its official page. The page below uses this account session.
Add this gift to the game library?
Keep this gift in the Steam inventory?
Gift added to the game library.
Gift saved in the Steam inventory.
Steam could not process this gift.
Notify when unread Steam account events or received gifts are found.
Friends, presence, games, and invitations for the selected Steam account.
Add or select a Steam account to view friends.
The Steam session has expired. Sign in again from the token page.
Steam could not be reached. Cached friends remain available.
Steam could not update this friend request.
